name: Anveshana
overview: An undercover investigating organization called UBI , is secretly operating in india with no one having clue about it except the agents themselves.One among the expert level agents is Mr.Ravi who works for UBI under a psuedo identity - Agent chanakya.Watch Anveshana , a spy comedy thriller webseries which deals with exposing the Honeytrap mafia.
